onset.Description: Onset time of the event, synchronized with the EEG recording clock.

duration.Description: Duration of the event. Zero (0) for instantaneous events.

sample.Description: Onset time of the event expressed in samples from the beginning of the recording.

type.Description: The category of the recorded event marker.

Levels.trigger: TTL pulse sent by stimulus presentation software.
Levels.response: A button press event recorded by the system.

value.Description: The raw numerical code of the event marker, mapping to experimental conditions for N2pc, CDA, N2, and FN400 analysis.

Levels.11: Stimulus-locked: 2-UR, left cue, change, unrepeated probe
Levels.12: Stimulus-locked: 3-UR, left cue, change, unrepeated probe

Levels.14: Stimulus-locked: 3-RSP, left cue, change, unrepeated probe

Levels.18: Stimulus-locked: 3-RSP, left cue, change, repeated probe
